x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Runbook automation enables Now Assist TSOM AI Agents to execute automated remediation. Without runbooks, AI Agent TSOM actions are limited to alerts and routing.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.check_script: (function(){try{if(!gs.tableExists("sn_si_trigger")){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Table not found",finding:"sn_si_trigger table not present -- manual verification required. Confirm Runbook Automation is installed and active."};}var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_si_trigger");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active runbook triggers",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" active runbook triggers. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents use runbook routing rules for automated remediation -- low count limits AI action scope.":n+" active runbook triggers -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agents can execute automated remediation.";};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};};})()
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure runbooks for key alert types via sa_runbook_list.do. Automate top repetitive remediation tasks. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents leverage runbooks for automated remediation.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb4
sys_update_version.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <ai_justification><![CDATA[Runbook automation enables Now Assist TSOM AI Agents to execute automated remediation. Without runbooks, AI Agent TSOM actions are limited to alerts and routing.]]></ai_justification> <check_name>Runbook Automation Configuration</check_name> <check_script><![CDATA[(function(){try{if(!gs.tableExists("sn_si_trigger")){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Table not found",finding:"sn_si_trigger table not present -- manual verification required. Confirm Runbook Automation is installed and active."};}var gr=new GlideRecord("sn_si_trigger");gr.addQuery("active",true);gr.query();var n=gr.getRowCount();return{status:n>=10?"ready":"needs_attention",actualValue:n+" active runbook triggers",finding:n<10?"Only "+n+" active runbook triggers. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents use runbook routing rules for automated remediation -- low count limits AI action scope.":n+" active runbook triggers -- Now Assist TSOM AI Agents can execute automated remediation.";};}catch(e){return{status:"needs_validation",actualValue:"Check failed",finding:"Script execution error: "+e.message};};})()]]></check_script> <is_active>true</is_active> <is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive> <is_manual>false</is_manual> <module>AIOPS</module> <number>CHK0006071</number> <order>40</order> <remediation_guidance>Configure runbooks for key alert types via sa_runbook_list.do. Automate top repetitive remediation tasks. Now Assist TSOM AI Agents leverage runbooks for automated remediation.</remediation_guidance> <sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by> <sys_created_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_created_on> <sys_id>0603a33acfd903108935fb251d851cb4</sys_id> <sys_mod_count>0</sys_mod_count> <sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by> <sys_updated_on>2026-06-09 22:05:59</sys_updated_on> </x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
